description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- Support session-scoped external folder refs / 支持会话级外部文件夹引用 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5453
- fix(bot): 修改连接工具审批时避免全量重启 BotGateway by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5454
- Fix file references in plan revisions / 修复修改计划中的文件引用 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5470
- fix(memorycompiler): filter tool_result evidence from user-facing citations (#5468) by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5487
- fix(desktop): include completion tokens in context gauge total (#5283) by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5467
- feat: improve Memory v5 task/chat classification with LLM classifier by @XTLine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5493
- Document Memory v5 classifier env / 补充 Memory v5 分类环境变量文档 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5501
- fix(desktop): avoid background close without tray restore by @GTC2080 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5498
- Clean up bot session mappings on delete / 删除 Bot 会话时清理映射 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5504
- Restrict status bar to configured items / 限制状态栏仅显示配置项 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5522
- feat(metrics): add session-cumulative input/在运行指标栏新增输入 tokens(命中/未命中缓存)和输出 tokens 统计 by @SauronSkywalker in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5500
- Fix desktop long-history lag and cancellation state / 修复桌面端长历史卡顿与取消状态 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5512
- fix(desktop): show run_skill subject by @cyq1017 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5528
- Fix edit_file old_string drift matching / 修复 edit_file 匹配漂移 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5529
- Soften themed user message bubbles / 柔化主题用户消息气泡 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5532
New Contributors
- @SauronSkywalker made their first contribution in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5500
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.13.0...desktop-v1.13.1
